message:
test(session-safety): add integration tests for session protection (sj6.9)

Add 11 new tests verifying session safety protections:
- test_same_session_protection: validates processes in same session are protected
- test_session_config_disables_protection: verifies config flags work
- test_session_analyzer_enumerate_members: tests session enumeration
- test_precheck_session_safety_integration: integration with LivePreCheckProvider
- test_tmux_env_parsing: TMUX environment variable parsing
- test_screen_env_parsing: STY environment variable parsing
- test_ssh_connection_parsing: SSH_CONNECTION parsing
- test_ssh_client_parsing: SSH_CLIENT parsing
- test_proc_stat_parsing: /proc/<pid>/stat parsing
- test_proc_stat_parsing_with_spaces_in_comm: handles comm fields with spaces
- test_session_protection_types_display: Display trait coverage

All tests pass. Closes process_triage-sj6.9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
